chapter_title.en: World created for purpose beyond itself

text: ٤٦٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): الدُّنْيَا خُلِقَتْ لِغَيْرِهَا، ولَمْ تُخْلَقْ لِنَفْسِهَا.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 463. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: This world has been created for other than itself and has not been created for itself.
